title: Chenille Chicks | Yellow | 4cm | Pack of 6
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Chenille Chicks - Yellow - 4cm - Pack of 6
DESIGN: This package includes six packs of Easter Chicks in one box.
USE TO DECORATE: These little easter chicks are great fun items to decorate Easter bonnets and crafts.
MATERIAL: These chicks are made from plastic and fabric, which are washable and easy to be dried and brushed.
ADORABLE: These toy chicks are adorable gifts for kids.
description: These chicks are perfect to put inside an egg and used as a gift to kids.
